ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sleep_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the data collection (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "avg_hrs_per_day_sleeping" REAL /* Average hours per day spent sleeping */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the average hours per day spent sleeping */,
  "type_of_days" TEXT /* Type of days (e.g., All days, Weekdays, Weekends) */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, device, app) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., self-report, sensor) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability score of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_validated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the data has been validated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages included in the age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "age_group_start" INTEGER /* Start age of the age group */,
  "age_group_end" INTEGER /* End age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "activity_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the activity */,
  "activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the activity (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Both, Male, Female) */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex */,
  "sex_code" TEXT /* Standard code for the sex (e.g., M, F, O) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
